requirements.summary: Create Careers section component with company culture introduction positioned above footer
acceptanceCriteria: Careers section appears above the Footer component in App.tsx
Section includes 'Join Our Team' as the main heading
Contains introductory paragraph about company culture and growth opportunities
Describes innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment
Follows the existing black, golden yellow, and white color scheme

file_operations.description: Create Careers component with 'Join Our Team' headline, company culture introduction paragraph describing innovation, creativity, and performance-driven environment. Use IntersectionObserver pattern for fade-in animations consistent with About, Services, and Portfolio components. Apply black, golden yellow, and white color scheme using existing CSS variables. Include section container with proper spacing and responsive layout.
Import and render Careers component above Footer component in the component hierarchy. Position it after ContactForm and before Footer to maintain the requested layout order.

requirements.summary: Display 3-5 job listings with specified example positions
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 job listings are displayed
Includes Digital Marketing Specialist position
Includes Paid Ads Manager position
Includes Social Media Strategist position
Includes Web Designer/Developer position
Includes Sales & Client Success Manager position
Job listings are displayed in a grid or card layout

file_operations.description: Add job listings array containing all five positions: Digital Marketing Specialist, Paid Ads Manager, Social Media Strategist, Web Designer/Developer, and Sales & Client Success Manager. Implement responsive grid layout for job cards (similar to Services and Portfolio grid patterns) that displays all job listings below the company culture introduction. Use consistent spacing and card styling with the existing site design.

requirements.summary: Display job details and Apply Now button for each listing
acceptanceCriteria: Each job card displays the job title prominently
Each job card includes a short description of the role
Each job card shows location information (Remote or On-site)
Each job card has an 'Apply Now' button
Apply Now buttons use golden yellow accent color matching ContactForm submit button styling
Job cards have hover effects consistent with existing Portfolio and Services sections

file_operations.description: Add job card component rendering within the grid that displays job title, short description, location (Remote/On-site), and 'Apply Now' button for each listing. Style buttons with golden yellow accent (bg-accent hover:bg-accent/90) matching ContactForm submit button. Implement hover effects on cards with transform and shadow transitions similar to Portfolio cards. Use Lucide React icons for location indicators consistent with site icon usage.

requirements.summary: Implement fade-in animations using IntersectionObserver pattern
acceptanceCriteria: Careers section uses IntersectionObserver for animation triggering
Section content fades in when scrolled into view
Animation timing and easing match existing sections
Job cards can have staggered fade-in effect similar to Portfolio cards

file_operations.description: Implement IntersectionObserver hook pattern (consistent with About, Services, Portfolio components) to trigger fade-in animations when section enters viewport. Add opacity and transform animations to section heading and introduction. Implement staggered fade-in for job cards using delay increments similar to Portfolio card animations. Use existing fade-in animation classes from index.css.

requirements.summary: Add Careers navigation link with smooth scroll functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation component includes 'Careers' link in both desktop and mobile menus
Careers link is positioned before Contact link
Clicking Careers link smoothly scrolls to Careers section
Mobile menu closes after clicking Careers link
Navigation link order remains: About, Services, Portfolio, Careers, Contact

file_operations.description: Add 'Careers' navigation link to both desktop and mobile navigation menus, positioned after Portfolio and before Contact. Add smooth scroll handler targeting the Careers section ID. Ensure mobile menu close functionality is triggered on Careers link click (consistent with existing navigation link behavior). Maintain the specified link order: About, Services, Portfolio, Careers, Contact.
Add section ID attribute 'careers' to the main section container element to enable smooth scroll navigation targeting from the Navigation component.
